name: Style Theory
overview: Hello Internet! Welcome to STYLE THEORY, where beauty is a science. Suit up and come along as we answer fashion’s most important questions: Is your makeup poisonous? Could a high heel actually kill someone? And how do the Hulk’s pants even stay on? Our closet is FULL of theories, so prepare to explore the world of style, trends, and fashion in a whole new way! Subscribe, because the best way to look is smart.
